name: Pearl Mantels 110 Williamsburg Unfinished Fireplace Mantel Surround
description:
The Pearl Mantels Williamsburg Fireplace Hearth Mantel - No. 110 says several things about your home. It says that you realize the importance of your hearth and fireplace - how they contribute to your home's decor. It says that you care about style and quality in your mantel just as much as you care about those qualities in the rest of your house. And it says, perhaps most importantly, that you have the sense to know that you don't have to spend a fortune to furnish your fireplace with a high-quality mantel of superior craftsmanship.

Just like other Pearl Mantels offerings, the Pearl Mantels Williamsburg Fireplace Hearth Mantel - No. 110 is hand crafted out of an Asian hardwood called Choi. This light-colored, tight-grained wood is similar in appearance and texture to American White Oak and creates a warm, rich mantel appearance. The wood easily accepts any paint or stain and can be matched to any home's interior.

Homeowners, you spend a lot of time around the fireplace with friends and family. Make it a place that is as beautiful and inviting as possible. You'll never question the fact that you got the best mantel available at the best price once you and your loved ones spend your first evening enjoying your new Pearl Mantels Williamsburg Fireplace Hearth Mantel - No. 110.

description: Pearl Mantels has created the Savannah fireplace mantel shelf. This light weight and graceful designed mantel shelf is created using unfinished Pine wood and will accept paint or stain with ease. This shelf is perfect for all the various rooms of your home. It features a hollow interior which makes it extremely lightweight; perfect for rooms where you can place this modern twist even with a traditional stylish feature. Peal Mantels inlays a small piece of pearl on the upper right shelf, so that you can feel confident that this piece is a true Peal Mantels. Enjoy this focal point in any room of your home. Enjoy the sweet stylings of the Savannah mantel shelf.

name: Pearl Mantels 495 Auburn Fireplace Mantel Shelf
description:
If you love the look and decorative possibilities provided by a mantel, but don't want your fireplace fully surrounded by a full-sized mantel, the Pearl Mantels Auburn Mantel Shelf - No. 495 may be the perfect solution for your home.

Mantel shelves allow you the same showplace for pictures, sculptures, paintings, or other decorative items that a full mantel would, but don't take up nearly as much space. And all Pearl Mantels mantel shelves are handcrafted to be just both as sturdy and as beautiful as a traditional hearth. The Pearl Mantels Auburn Mantel Shelf - No. 495 is available both finished and unfinished, allowing you the choice of having a beautiful factory finish applied, or applying your own favorite stain or paint to match your home.

Whatever you choose, this mantel shelf will make a meaningful and valuable addition to your home. Get the Pearl Mantels Auburn Mantel Shelf - No. 495 today and get started turning the fireplace you have into the fireplace you've always wanted.

description: If you have a custom surround, or don't want to cover up a large part of your wall, a mantel shelf is the way to go. The Lexington Shelf has decorative elements that create a rustic, distressed look, down to the raw edging and decorative scoring. And you have a choice of unfinished or Medium Rustic Distressed finishes, you can create the exact look that you want, easily. And all of the mantel shelves from Pearl Mantel are easy to hang without a lot of extra work or having to alter your walls. With the hanging rails and hollow back, these mantels are just as easy to hang as a picture.
